fr:resource.fr:resource-source: \begin {tikzpicture}[diagram] \SpliceDiagramSquare <l/>{ height = 1.5cm, west/style = lies over, east/style = lies over, north/style = <-, south/style = <-, ne/style = ne pullback, ne = \bar {h}, se = h, sw = x, nw = u, south = p_{h}, north = \bar {p}_{h} } \SpliceDiagramSquare <r/>{ height = 1.5cm, west/style = lies over, east/style = lies over, glue = west, glue target = l/, ne = v, se = x, north = \epsilon _{h}, south = p_{h}, } \end {tikzpicture}
